title: feat: add claude-sonnet-5 (bedrock)
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Adds Claude Sonnet 5 as a paid text model via AWS Bedrock (launched today).

- Registry entry `claude-sonnet-5` (alias `sonnet-5`), routing to Bedrock `global.anthropic.claude-sonnet-5`
- 1M context, tools + vision, adaptive thinking (same transform as Sonnet 4.6)
- Priced at standard $3/$15 per MTok with cache rates ($0.30 read / $3.75 write). Intro $2/$10 runs through 2026-08-31, but using standard to match siblings and avoid a price bump when it ends
- The `global.*` inference profile works on our Bedrock account (no `us.*` needed, unlike Opus 4.7/4.8)

Verified end-to-end on local gen against live Bedrock: basic + streaming generation, max_tokens edge, tool calls, image input, and billing (Tinybird rows exact, no missing-rate warnings, multiplier 1). Automated suites pass (enter aliases/pricing/snapshot, gen permissions/usage/cache/billing).

gist.headline: Sonnet 5 joins the hive
gist.blurb: Claude Sonnet 5 is now live on the API! Bring 1M context, vision, and adaptive thinking to your next prompt.
gist.summary: Added Claude Sonnet 5 (`claude-sonnet-5`) as a paid text model via AWS Bedrock, featuring 1M context, vision, and tool support at standard $3/$15 per MTok pricing.
gist.impact: Developers can now access Anthropic's newest model using the `claude-sonnet-5` or `sonnet-5` aliases, complete with caching and adaptive thinking capabilities.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot examining a glowing stone tablet (Bedrock) with a large '5' on it, symbolizing the new Claude Sonnet 5 model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot and the chunky monitor robot examining a glowing stone tablet with a large '5' carved into it. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots nearby. Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
